title: Upstart (UPST) Reports Strong Q4 Revenue and Loan Origination Growth
text: Upstart Holdings delivered strong performance in Q4 2025. Auto and home originations each grew 5X in 2025 and accelerated even further in Q4. Transaction volume showed 1,497,149 loans originated, up 115% year-over-year. Q4 2025 Performance: Revenue was $296.09M, beating estimates by $7.53M, with EPS Normalized Actual at $0.50 (beating by $0.03) and EPS GAAP Actual at $0.17 (beating by $0.02). Full-year 2025 revenue reached $1.04 billion (up 64% from 2024) with net income of $54 million and adjusted EBITDA of $230 million at a 22% margin. Capital Partnership Strategy: So far in 2026, Upstart has signed more than $4 billion in committed capital partnerships, completed two securitizations for $1 billion in total collateral, and increased the proportion of home and auto loans funded by a third party. Business Diversification: Upstart Holdings operates a cloud-based AI lending platform through three segments: Personal Lending, Auto Lending, and Other. Its platform includes unsecured personal loans, small dollar loans, auto refinance, auto retail loans, and home equity lines of credit.
